summary: Tested 8 assertions (VAL-CODEX-001 through VAL-CODEX-008): all 8 passed. 14 pytest tests covering all Codex ingestion behaviors passed. Production DB confirms 57 codex records with correct source_tool tagging. discover_sources() finds 5 codex session files and 1 history file.
